events.title: All- You -Can -Eat   Fish Fry & FIXIN'S
events.location: At The Spot ( 6 2nd  St NE Minot 58703 )  East side station
events.description:
All- you -can -eat  Fish Fry & Fixin's
 Golden Fried Whiting and Catfish Fillets  served with Collard Greens, Baked Beans, Coleslaw, Corn On The Cob
$30 per person All You Can Eat
$25 per person Take out Special 2 piece with 2 sides
Tickets will be available At EVENTBRITECOM, THE SPOT, & B & R SEAFOOD & MORE
Thank You

events.title: Hello, B & R Seafood & More will be closed from  today Wednesday April 29th and will re-open Wednesday May 13th at 5pm.  We will be picking up supplies while closed. We thank each and everyone of you for kind patience and support.
